summary: Frontend-only testing of Scenario Browser UI at /browser route. All 15 features tested and working. Fixed one bug: clearFilters race condition causing 0 scenarios to show after clearing filters.

ui_bugs.issue: Race condition: clearFilters called fetchScenarios immediately after set(), causing get() to read stale state. Fixed by wrapping fetchScenarios call in setTimeout(fn, 0)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed. Uses existing 19 sources, 99 scenarios, 875 trajectories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scenario Browser UI at /browser fully tested. All features working: grid/list views, sidebar filters (sources by tier, categories, temperature slider), search, sort dropdown, detail drawer with trajectory chart, favorite/compare buttons, compare workspace with overlay charts and statistics, favorites tab, analytics tab with 3 charts. Fixed clearFilters race condition bug.
passed_tests: Frontend UI Tests (15/15 passed):
1. /browser page loads with 99 scenario cards in grid view
2. Sidebar shows temperature slider (1.0-5.0°C range)
3. Sidebar shows source checkboxes grouped by 6 tiers (Primary, Models, Regional, Sector, Pricing, Physical)
4. Sidebar shows category checkboxes (APS, Baseline, Carbon Pricing, Disorderly, etc.)
5. Checking NGFS source checkbox filters to 27 NGFS scenarios
6. Temperature slider filters scenarios by temperature target range (tested 2.2-5.0°C → 52 scenarios)
7. Sort dropdown changes sorting (Name, Temp, Data Size) - Sort by Temp shows scenarios ordered by temperature
8. Grid/List view toggle switches between card grid and compact list view
9. Clicking scenario card opens detail drawer with metadata (Temp Target, Trajectories, Horizon, Version)
10. Detail drawer shows trajectory chart with variable dropdown (Emissions|CO2, GDP|PPP, etc.)
11. Detail drawer Favorite button toggles (Favorite → Favorited)
12. Detail drawer Compare button adds scenario to compare workspace with toast notification
13. Compare tab shows compare workspace with 3 colored scenario badges (BASE label on first)
14. Compare workspace Run button generates overlay charts with statistics (Min, Max, Spread %)
15. Favorites tab shows favorited scenarios in list view
16. Analytics tab shows stat cards (Sources: 19, Scenarios: 99, Variables: 62, Regions: 13)
17. Analytics tab shows Temperature Targets bar chart distribution
18. Analytics tab shows Scenarios by Tier pie chart with color legend
19. Analytics tab shows Top Categories horizontal bar chart
20. Filter chips appear when filters active (NGFS ×, Disorderly ×, temp range badge)
21. Clear button in sidebar clears all filters and shows 99 scenarios (after fix)
22. Search bar filters scenarios by name query (NGFS → 16 results)
